languages.text: "Я не намерен{mf||а} ничего разрушать. Даю слово".
"I have no intention of damaging anything. I give you my word."
languages.original_text: "Я не намерен{mf||а} ничего разрушать. Даю слово".

traits.locale_text: "I have no intention of damaging anything. I give you my word."
"I have no intention of damaging anything. I give you my word."
"I have no intention of damaging anything. I give you my word."
"I have no intention of damaging anything. I give you my word."

languages.text: 「私は何も壊すつもりはありません。私の言葉に耳を傾けてください。」
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of damaging anything. I give you my word."

traits.locale_text: 「私は何も壊すつもりはありません。私の言葉に耳を傾けてください。」

languages.text: “我无意损坏任何东西。我向你保证。”
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of damaging anything. I give you my word."

traits.locale_text: “我无意损坏任何东西。我向你保证。”

languages.text: "Hiçbir şeye zarar vermeye niyetim yok. Söz veriyorum."
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of damaging anything. I give you my word."

traits.locale_text: "Hiçbir şeye zarar vermeye niyetim yok. Söz veriyorum."

languages.text: «No tengo intención de dañar nada. Te doy mi palabra».
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of damaging anything. I give you my word."

traits.locale_text: «No tengo intención de dañar nada. Te doy mi palabra».

languages.text: « Je n'ai pas l'intention d'endommager quoi que ce soit. Je vous en donne ma parole. »
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of damaging anything. I give you my word."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'ai pas l'intention d'endommager quoi que ce soit. Je vous en donne ma parole. »

languages.text: "Ich habe nicht vor, etwas zu beschädigen. Ich gebe Euch mein Wort."
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of damaging anything. I give you my word."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe nicht vor, etwas zu beschädigen. Ich gebe Euch mein Wort."
